sourceMovie.title: Strays
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Strays works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: A Bug's Life
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Strays clicked for you, A Bug's Life (1998) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Strays?
faq.answer: Try A Bug's Life, Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls, Johnny English—each shares DNA with Strays while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Strays?
faq.answer: Strays (2023) is best described as Comedy, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Strays worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
